conservative.name: Bridge of Shadows
conservative.requirements:
4 power per target
all targets must be engaged with you and in shadow or under the influence of a Grey Order spell
(you may target yourself)

success.description: Your targets fade into the shadows and reappear anywhere within your line of sight

chaosStar.description: Your targets do not appear where you intend, but somewhere within close range of where you intended

sigmarsComet.description: The targets are invisible until the end of your next turn

reckless.name: Bridge of Shadows
reckless.requirements:
4 power per target
all targets must be engaged with you and in shadow or under the influence of a Grey Order spell
(you may target yourself

success.description: Your targets fade into the shadows and reappear anywhere within your line of sight

chaosStar.description: Your targets do not appear where you intend, but somewhere within close range of where you intended

sigmarsComet.description: Gain 3 power and you may immediately cast another Grey Order spell of Rank 3 or less
